eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Alachua; Baker; Bay; Bradford; Brevard; Citrus; Clay; Columbia; Dixie; Duval; Flagler; Gilchrist; Hamilton; Jefferson; Lafayette; Lake; Leon; Levy; Madison; Marion; Nassau; Orange; Putnam; St. Johns; Seminole; Suwannee; Taylor; Union; Volusia; Wakulla, FL; at 9:58 PM on SEP 21, 2019 Effective until 11:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Florida AMBER Alert has been issued for Corey Brown, a black male, 13 years old, 5 feet 5 inches tall, 105 pounds, black hair and brown eyes, last seen in the area of the 11000 block of Baptist Health Drive in Jacksonville, Florida, who was last seen wearing a red shirt and black pants. The child may be in the company of Patrick Felton, a black male, 38 years old, 6 feet 1 inch tall, 190 pounds, black hair and brown eyes, who was last seen wearing a black tank-top, blue jeans, and brown boots. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please contact the Jacksonville Sheriff's Office at 904-630-0500, or 911. #FLAMBER.
